title: SMED Changeover Optimizer
description: Calculates changeover time reduction potential using Single-Minute Exchange of Die (SMED) methodology, aligned with Lean Six Sigma and ISO 9001:2015 standards.

inputs.label: Current Changeover Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Total time from last good piece of previous run to first good piece of next run. Measured per SMED standard.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time from last good piece of previous run to first good piece of next run. Measured per SMED standard.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki partinin son iyi parçasından sonraki partinin ilk iyi parçasına kadar geçen toplam süre. SMED standardına göre ölçülür.

inputs.label: Internal Operations (% of total time)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of changeover time where machine is stopped. Target is to convert internal to external.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of changeover time where machine is stopped. Target is to convert internal to external.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Makinenin durduğu değişim süresinin yüzdesi. Hedef, dahiliyi hariciye dönüştürmektir.

inputs.label: Setup Team Size (operators)
inputs.businessContext: Number of operators directly involved in the changeover process.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of operators directly involved in the changeover process.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değişim sürecine doğrudan dahil olan operatör sayısı.

inputs.label: Parallel Work Possible
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if tasks can be performed simultaneously by multiple operators (SMED principle).

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if tasks can be performed simultaneously by multiple operators (SMED principle).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Görevlerin birden fazla operatör tarafından eşzamanlı olarak gerçekleştirilip gerçekleştirilemeyeceğini belirtir (SMED prensibi).

inputs.label: Standardization Level
inputs.businessContext: Degree of standardized work instructions, tooling, and die design. High = minimal adjustments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Degree of standardized work instructions, tooling, and die design. High = minimal adjustments.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standartlaştırılmış iş talimatları, takım ve kalıp tasarımı derecesi. Yüksek = minimum ayar.

inputs.label: Waste Motion Score (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective assessment of unnecessary movement, searching, and walking during changeover. 1 = optimal, 10 = extreme waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective assessment of unnecessary movement, searching, and walking during changeover. 1 = optimal, 10 = extreme waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değişim sırasında gereksiz hareket, arama ve yürümenin subjektif değerlendirmesi. 1 = optimal, 10 = aşırı atık.

rules.message: Internal and external operations must sum to 100%.
Parallel work requires at least 2 operators.
High standardization should correlate with low waste motion score (≤5).

thresholds.message: Changeover time exceeds 60 minutes; consider SMED kaizen event.
High internal operation ratio; focus on converting to external.
Critical waste motion; implement 5S and visual management.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
